basic_details.job_title: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Kalahandi Nutritionist cum Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Kalahandi has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Nutritionist cum Counsellor - NRC Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Zilla Swasthya Samiti Kalahandi office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age relaxation for OSH&FW Society employees who have completed at least three terms (11 months each) of contractual service with Outstanding or Very Good PAR.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in Food and Nutrition / Home Science (Hons/pass)
qualification.details: Graduation in Food and Nutrition / Home Science (Hons/pass). Must be a lady Candidate.

salary_details.details: Rs. 21,782/- Per Month + others incentive as applicable in OSH & FW society norms

selection_process: Written Test (20 Marks) Computer Test (10 Marks) Group Discussion (10 Marks) Personal Interview (10 Marks)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor - NRC post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor - NRC post is scheduled for 06 June 2026. Candidates should report for registration between 09:30 AM and 10:30 AM on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor - NRC post is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years as of 01 May 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor - NRC position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree in Food and Nutrition or Home Science (Hons/pass). Additionally, the candidate must be a lady.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor - NRC post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 21,782/- per month, along with other incentives as applicable according to OSH & FW society norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor - NRC role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test (20 Marks), a Computer Test (10 Marks), a Group Discussion (10 Marks), and a Personal Interview (10 Marks).

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Zilla Swasthya Samiti Kalahandi office. Specific details about the exact venue should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation provided?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for OSH&FW Society employees who have completed at least three terms (11 months each) of contractual service with Outstanding or Very Good PAR.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor - NRC post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Nutritionist cum Counsellor - NRC post in Zilla Swasthya Samiti Kalahandi.
